headline: Attacks on Gulf energy facilities intensify, fueling fears of a 'gas war'
description: Tehran has vowed to wage a vast retaliation campaign against neighboring countries' energy infrastructure, after Iran's South Pars gas field was struck by the Israeli military.

headline: Strait of Hormuz becomes site of asymmetric naval war with uncertain outcome
Paris mayoral frontrunner Grégoire faces fierce attacks from rivals in debate
How Budapest became a hub for Western nationalists under Viktor Orban
description: The Hungarian capital, popular among hard-right circles in the West, is home to a number of think tanks and conferences promoting the image of Prime Minister Viktor Orban with the approach of the legislative elections on April 12.

headline: EU lawmaker committee moves to implement US trade deal
description: Lawmakers on the European Parliament's trade committee voted to cut EU tariffs on some US imports as provided under the previous EU-US trade deal, but added a 'multi-tiered safety net,' according to the committee head.

headline: French far right failed to confirm local gains in mid-sized cities
description: Almost all the medium-sized cities where Marine Le Pen's Rassemblement National party has made significant gains since 2014 are concentrated in the north and along the Mediterranean coast.

headline: Yazidi genocide trial: Sabri Essid, the 'monster' husband who became a slave owner
description: On Wednesday, the French jihadist's ex-wife told the court about the man he had been before he turned to jihad. In France, she was the first woman to suffer his violence and perversion. Then, in Syria, the terrorist found the ideal environment to freely unleash his desire to dominate.

In Paris, Reza Pahlavi, son of Iran's last shah, builds his network
description: Reza Pahlavi has been based in the French capital since the US-Israeli strikes on Iran started, making moves in anticipation of the Islamic Republic's fall.

headline: Violence in restaurant kitchens exposes deep wounds in fine dining
description: The recent allegations against renowned Danish chef René Redzepi highlight the urgent need for a profound overhaul of management practices in the restaurant industry. Initiatives are spreading in France to break the silence surrounding abuse in the sector.

headline: French municipal elections: See the first-round results on our map
description: Follow the 2026 municipal elections' first-round results in real time with our interactive map, and see which lists are in the lead and which mayors have been directly elected.
